name: code4me
description: Multi-agent SDLC orchestration with workflow weights, quality gates, independent model/effort routing, optional vendor bridges, and supervised improvement experiments.

interface.shortDescription: Structured SDLC workflows and review gates for coding agents.
interface.longDescription: code4me classifies work by weight, routes specialist skills with independent model and effort choices, persists local workflow artifacts, coordinates optional vendor bridges, and runs supervised probe-driven improvement experiments.
